calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is a petition to terminate the estate, that Mr. Hom was asked to provide a proposed order, that he has not done so and is not present in court. The petition to terminate the estate was taken off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
